name: Josh Wolf
subject: One year out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Hey there --

I promise I'm not doing my math wrong. Campaigns usually focus on one election day -- November 2016. Here in Florida, we've got two to worry about.

**Patrick has a competitive primary here in Florida.** Which means we've got two big election days to look forward to. And the first, Primary Day, is August 30, 2016.

The end of this month is our year-out mark. **And we want to get $25,000 into our Year Out Fund before then.**[**Can you make a contribution today to get us closer?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2032/738133e4/3adb8a90/7f94d44f/1055062160/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150817/?recurring=true")

Patrick is running a transparent and honest campaign. He's out there traveling the state, talking to people, getting his message out.

**But that 's not a job Patrick can do all by himself. **We have to organize volunteers. We have to send out mailers, run ads, pay for all that travel. That's how we help put Patrick in the Senate.

All of our organizing is vital to winning this campaign.**It 's also expensive.**

[**We can 't wait a year to get Patrick's message out to every Floridian. We have to do the work now -- and we need the money to do it. If you can, contribute $5 or more to help fill our Year Out Fund before our Year Out deadline on the 30th.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2032/738133e4/3adb8a90/7f94d44f/1055062160/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150817/?recurring=true")

Thanks.

Josh

Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Friends of Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2032/738133e4/3adb8a90/7f94d448/1055062160/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2032/738133e4/3adb8a90/7f94d449/1055062160/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").
